preflight_status.listener_classification_observation: Port 12444 holds an LLMDYNAMIX cloud-router listener. The config at /Users/jeffreycruz/.llmdynamix/merged-config.yaml declares Ollama (11434), LM Studio (4521), and ocelot puma.cpp (12435) backends. Ollama /api/ps reports 0 loaded models; LM Studio 4521 is not listening; ocelot (puma.cpp) is CPU-only and excluded from _LLMDYNAMIX_LOCAL_HEAVY_BACKEND_MARKERS in the dflash_boundary module. Cloud-only classification therefore holds: not a DFlash local-resource blocker.

phase_1_preflight_passed.observation: Resource gate remains ready: ports 3180/3181/3182 are empty, port 12444 holds a cloud-only LLMDYNAMIX listener (Ollama reports 0 loaded models, LM Studio 4521 not listening, ocelot puma.cpp is CPU-only). The pre-load and phase-aware post-load preflight passed cleanly. ~38 GiB residual free memory was sufficient for the real Qwen3.6 27B target + 4.7 GB drafter + headroom.

phase_2_target_loaded_warmup_completed.observation: The Qwen3.6 27B target loaded end-to-end through ModelKit, ran the standard sequential startup warmup (prompt_tokens=25 -> 513 -> 4095), and produced token=446 text_len=2 on each warmup with mode=sequential, distributed=False, ThreadLocalStream(Device(gpu, 0), 4). phase_4_drafter_loaded_target_verify_suc.observation: The Qwen3.5 z-lab DFlash drafter was loaded successfully. The smoke reached the first target_verify=True call inside dflash_stream_generate (mlx_engine/utils/dflash_runtime.py:308). After the m14-qwen35-target-verify-forwarding fix (239465c), _patched_qwen3_5_language_model_call now declares target_verify=False and forwards it to the inner self.model(...) call, so the wrapper chain accepts and propagates target_verify end-to-end without raising TypeError.

boundary_check_vs_runtime_path_attributi.rationale: Pre-load probe_dflash_readiness (cloud-only listener allowed, sufficient memory), the phase-aware post-load validate_dflash_postload_compatibility, and validate_dflash_runtime_compatibility (shape-strict 16+48 layout) all passed. The shape-strict ArraysCache layout check from fa634dc accepted the real Qwen3.6 target. The wrapper rollback_speculative_cache hook from 62adb12 is present on the outer TextModel.

After 239465c + f00a083, _patched_qwen3_5_language_model_call declares target_verify=False in its signature and forwards the kwarg to the inner self.model(...) call. The inner PatchedQwen3_5TextModel.__call__ also accepts target_verify, and the patched mlx-vlm Qwen3_5Attention / Qwen3_5GatedDeltaNet layers honor target_verify on their target_verify / gdn_sink / left_padded_decode branches. dflash_stream_generate completed the first target verify call with zero TypeError.
